name: isecure-ts-client
description: TypeScript SDK for the ISECure WS Channel API

scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p .generated src/generated && swagger2openapi wsapi_v2.json -o .generated/wsapi_v2.openapi.json && openapi-typescript .generated/wsapi_v2.openapi.json -o src/generated/wsapi-v2.ts
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && yarn generate:types && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: yarn generate:types && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.examples.json --noEmit
scripts.prepublishOnly: yarn typecheck && yarn test && yarn pack:check
